ModuleTitle.helper: Used by OpenContent and DNN module settings. This is not displayed to site visitors.

ModuleAnchor.helper: Optional. Used to create #anchor-links on the page. Use only letters, numbers, and hyphens.

SectionTitle.helper: Optional. Main section heading. HTML is allowed and will render in the view.

SectionDescription.helper: Optional. Supporting text shown below the heading. HTML is allowed and will render in the view.
SectionDescription.placeholder: Use this area for a short, centered introduction to the section.
